findings.description: evmBalanceFetcher is a public mutable var. Consider making it private with a setter or using constructor injection to prevent external mutation after initialization.
findings.suggestion: Change to: var evmBalanceFetcher: EvmBalanceFetcher? = null; internal set

findings.description: NavRoutes.CREATE_WALLET, SEED_CONFIRMATION, IMPORT_WALLET, SET_PASSWORD are defined but not used as NavHost destinations (onboarding is a single composable). These are dead constants.
findings.suggestion: Remove unused route constants or add a TODO comment explaining they will be used when onboarding is split into separate nav destinations.

findings.description: BCrypt.gensalt(12) is called on the main thread inside setPassword(). For production use, this should be moved to a coroutine on Dispatchers.Default since bcrypt cost 12 can take ~250ms.
findings.suggestion: Consider wrapping the password hashing in a coroutine in a future task when the ViewModel lifecycle is wired properly.

findings.description: Using deprecated ExperimentalMaterialApi pullRefresh. This is acceptable given BOM 2024.02.00 constraint but should be migrated to Material3 PullToRefreshBox when BOM is upgraded.
findings.suggestion: Add TODO comment noting the migration target.

summary: Clean implementation. Architecture decisions (state hoisting for WalletScreen, EvmBalanceFetcher abstraction, OnboardingPlaceholder) are reasonable given the DI constraints. One low finding (mutable var visibility) and three informational items. Approve with comments.
